name: Better Shulker Boxes
description: Peek inside Shulker Boxes and Ender Chests without placing them! Better Shulker Boxes adds a rich 9×3 interactive tooltip that lets you preview, insert, and extract items directly from any inventory screen. Scroll to select slots, left-click to extract, right-click to insert — no more tedious place-open-close-break cycles. Features full server-side validation to prevent duplication exploits, rate-limited Ender Chest syncing, and seamless compatibility with vanilla mechanics.
